title: As Trump Bashes Spain on Military Spending, German Chancellor Merz Looks On
author: Jim Tankersley
fullText: Friedrich Merz has called for greater European unity, but he did not publicly object to the president rebuking Spain and Britain during an Oval Office meeting.
summary: Friedrich Merz has called for greater European unity, but he did not publicly object to the president rebuking Spain and Britain during an Oval Office meeting.
